title: The Union Territories (Stamp and Court-fees Laws) Act, 1961
full_text: The Union Territories (Stamp and Court-fees Laws) Act, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196133 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1961-08-29 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Union Territories (Stamp and Court-fees Laws) Act, 1961 Long Title: An Act to provide for the amendment and repeal of certain laws relating to stamp duties and court-fees as in force in certain Union territories. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Union Territories (Stamp and Court-fees Laws) Act, 1961 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Amendment of Indian Stamp Act, 1899, as in force in Himachal Pradesh. Section 3. Repeal of Court-fees Act, 1870, as in force in Himachal Pradesh. Section 4. Repeal of Court-fees Act, 1870, as in force in Manipur and Tripura. Section 5. Repeal of Indian Stamp Act, 1899, as in force in Manipur and Tripura. Section 6. Validation of levy of stamp duties in certain cases.
